title: juncus tenageia subsp. sphaerocarpus
intro: Juncus tenageia subsp. sphaerocarpus, also known as spherical rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of spherical rush include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, spherical rush is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
